name: x402-cfo
description: Spend control plane for autonomous agent payments. Anomaly detection (enforce/review/off), multi-agent budget pools with fleet policy inheritance, event sink for future hosted integration, and proof metrics. Zero dependencies.

scripts.test: node --test --import tsx tests/budget.test.ts tests/policy.test.ts tests/controller.test.ts tests/events.test.ts tests/storage.test.ts tests/advanced.test.ts tests/integrations.test.ts tests/anomaly.test.ts tests/pool.test.ts tests/router.test.ts tests/forecast.test.ts tests/network.test.ts tests/anomaly-mode.test.ts tests/sink.test.ts tests/fleet-policy.test.ts

author: Tiguri GmbH
